front_determination_method.unique: The object has a clearly identifiable front side based on symbols, signboards, reflectors, or light-emitting devices.
front_determination_method.rectangle_longest_side: The object has a rectangular base and the longer side determines the front.
front_determination_method.square_any_side: The object is square or nearly square, allowing any side to be treated as the front.

options.a: pole -> bend = true, sub_class = infrastructure, front_determination = square_any_side
options.b: pole -> bend = false, sub_class = sign_post, front_determination = unique
options.c: pole -> bend = false, sub_class = infrastructure, front_determination = unique
options.d: pole -> bend = true, sub_class = infrastructure, front_determination = rectangle_longest_side

correct_answer_text: pole -> bend = false, sub_class = infrastructure, front_determination = unique
